project_name: Rajguru Foods Fleet & Vehicle Management System

theme_and_archetype.reasoning: As an operational ERP/Fleet Management dashboard, it requires high authority, clarity, and function-first design. The UI needs to handle dense tabular data and compliance alerts without visual fatigue.

background.description: Base app background. Slightly cool tinted off-white for depth against pure white cards.

surface.description: Pure white for all cards, tables, and widget containers. Always use a 1px solid border, no shadows.

primary.description: High contrast dark slate for primary actions and heavy headings.

danger.description: Used for document expiry, accidents, and critical downtime alerts.

warning.description: Used for upcoming maintenance, pending approvals, and low fuel warnings.

success.description: Used for active running vehicles, valid documents, and completed trips.

info.description: Used for active Fastag recharges and informational tags.

alignment_rules.data_tables: Left-align text, right-align numeric values and currency (₹).

structure.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar for navigation (Vehicles, Drivers, Reports, Alerts).
structure.topbar: Global search, user profile, and high-priority notification bell.

modifications.cards: Remove default shadow. Add border-slate-200. Use sharp corners or max rounded-sm.
modifications.tabs: For the Vehicle Profile page (9 tabs). Override h-9 to h-12. Use scrollable tabs horizontally on mobile. Active tab gets a stark 2px bottom border (border-slate-900) instead of background fill.
modifications.tables: Dense rows. Hover state: hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900. Striped rows allowed for readability.
modifications.buttons: Primary: bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-none hover:bg-slate-800. Secondary: border border-slate-300 bg-white text-slate-700 rounded-none hover:bg-slate-50.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

login_page.layout: Split screen. Left: High-quality logistics image with gradient overlay. Right: Clean white login form with Google OAuth button.

dashboard_overview.top_row: Hero metrics (Active Vehicles, Alerts/Expirations, Today's Expenses).
dashboard_overview.alerts_panel: Dedicated high-visibility list for expiring documents and scheduled maintenance.

vehicle_profile.header: Vehicle Number Plate format (e.g., MH 12 AB 1234) as H1. Status pill (Active/Maintenance/Downtime).
vehicle_profile.navigation: 9 Shadcn Tabs: Documents, Trips, Fuel, Service, Repairs, Tyres, Accidents, Expenses, Downtime.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp and instant. Background shifts by 1 shade (e.g., white to slate-50). No bouncy animations.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: None. Keep it feeling like a fast native app.
motion_and_interactions.modals: Slide-in from right (Sheet component) for adding Fuel/Trip data. Use Dialog for destructive actions (e.g., deleting a record).

login_background.description: White logistics truck driving on a winding road, representing supply chain flow. Use with a black/30 overlay.

driver_avatar_placeholder.description: Sikh truck driver portrait for placeholder profiles in Driver Management.

accessibility_and_ux.contrast: Ensure all text against slate-50/white passes APCA standards. Warnings (Amber) must have dark amber text, not white.
accessibility_and_ux.forms: All inputs must have visible labels. Currency inputs must show '₹' prefix. Distance inputs must show 'KM' suffix.
